sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I'm at 23 actions and still stuck. Let me think about this completely differently.
The only clicks that cause gameplay changes are clicks on the compartments (c walls or N/Y shapes). These clicks toggle the sources. But the level never completes after toggling.
What if the goal is NOT about toggling sources? What if the goal is about clicking on the G-colored dividers between the compartments?
Looking at the ascii:
```
Row 19: BgcccccGcccccgB
Row 21: BgcNcccGcccNcgB
```
The G divider is at column 42 in the top container. And in the bottom container:
```
Row 41: BgGGGGGg
```
The G divider is a horizontal bar at row 41, columns 22-26.
I've tried clicking on (18, 42) which is the g-colored frame, and it only changed the HUD. But I haven't tried clicking on the G dividers specifically.
Let me try clicking on the G divider in the top container at (19, 42).
Actually wait, I already tried (18, 42) which is the g frame. Let me try (19, 42) which is the G divider.
But actually, looking at the ascii, row 19 has:
```
BgcccccGcccccgB
```
At column 42, there's a G. So (19, 42) is the G divider. Let me try clicking on it.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on G divider in top container at (19, 42)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 42}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
